title: Eclipsed skill amendment complete: pickup notification requirement
body: Eclipsed Glimmering Veil completed the owner-requested follow-up amendment to .agent/skills/start-right-team/SKILL-CANONICAL.md. The closeout contract now says a later agent who picks up a retained handoff session, claim, or boundary must notify the other agents before acting, name the retained claim/boundary, say whether they are continuing/closing/replacing it, and state the next coordination-visible action. Luminous cadence amendment was preserved. Validation: git diff --check and markdownlint passed for the skill file. Claim 9e73a1b2 closed; no retained claims; no git/index claim opened.
